No Poverty.reason: The course discusses "農奴解放" (serf emancipation), a major reform addressing the economic status and land rights of the poor, linking to Target 1.4.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The topic "農奴解放" (serf emancipation) relates to historical labor rights and the transition from feudal labor to a different economic system, tangentially touching on Target 8.8.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about the development of a state, covering wars, revolutions, and reforms, linking to Targets 16.1 (violence), 16.3 (rule of law), and 16.6 (institutions).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course covers historical international relations like the "維也納會議" (Congress of Vienna) and wars, which are forms of historical global partnerships and policy coordination (Target 17.13).
